title: intercept input
description: Input schema for the intercept tool.

intercept_id.description: Intercepted request/response ID (required for all actions).

mode.description: Forwarding mode: structured (default, L7 modifications) or raw (bypass L7, send raw bytes).

raw_override_base64.description: Base64-encoded raw bytes for raw mode forwarding (required for modify_and_forward with mode=raw).

override_method.description: HTTP method override (request phase, structured mode).

add_headers.description: Headers to add (request phase, structured mode).

remove_headers.description: Header names to remove (request phase, structured mode).

override_body.description: Body override (request phase, structured mode; or WebSocket frame payload).

override_status.description: HTTP status code override (response phase, structured mode).

override_response_headers.description: Response header overrides (response phase, structured mode).

add_response_headers.description: Response headers to add (response phase, structured mode).

remove_response_headers.description: Response header names to remove (response phase, structured mode).

override_response_body.description: Response body override (response phase, structured mode).
